title: SToby's Borderless Polished Blocks
description:
Optifine used to have cool borderless polished blocks, and I have never seen a worthy replacement, so I made one!
This pack changes all the 'polished' variant stones in Minecraft!
body:
# Borderless Polished Blocks 

## Overview
Simply, I wanted to create a mod that has the elegance and simplicity of the old optifine connected textures for polished stone variants, without the pain of using optifine. With this resource pack, polished andesite, diorite, granite, tuff, deepslate and blackstone are now borderless textures, with as much honesty to the original texture as possible. For me, it makes them far more useful in gradients, walls, and other places that you don't want a 'tiled' feeling. Being as small as it is, this pack rarely needs updating.

## Contact Me
The only way to contact me is through Bluesky DMs; comments, requests, and bug reports should all go there.

https://bsky.app/profile/stoby.bsky.social

## Usage
You may freely use this pack, but attempting to re-create it without credit will lead to slightly miffed comments. To be honest, I have no idea if this idea is unique, so I will never know if you copy it, however, I do like credits lol.

## Support Me
A Kofi link is available if you love this pack, but only gift if you have spare disposable income, I made this pack in a few hours it's not that big of a deal lmao.
